home.meta.title: Bangalore Votes — find your GBA ward
home.meta.description: Find your Greater Bengaluru Authority ward, check the election status, and get ready to vote in the GBA corporator elections.
home.hero.heading: Find your ward
home.hero.subheading: Enter your address to find your new GBA ward, its candidates, and local issues.
home.form.label: Address
home.form.helper: You can also enter your 6-digit pincode
home.result.shortlistHeading: Your pincode covers more than one ward — choose yours:
home.result.outOfCoverage: This doesn't appear to be in the GBA area.
home.result.usePincode: We couldn't place that address for certain — try your 6-digit pincode instead.
home.shortcuts.checkRegistration.title: Check your registration
home.shortcuts.checkRegistration.descrip: See if you're on the electoral roll.
home.shortcuts.votingGuide.title: Voting guide
home.shortcuts.votingGuide.description: Everything you need to know, from registration to voting day.

__hints.common.notDeclared: Shown in place of a candidate field the candidate has not filled in — neutral, not accusatory.
__hints.common.source.curator: Distinguish from official/affidavit sources — this is our editorial team's compiled context, not a government document.
__hints.common.flagError: Action label on the button citizens tap to report incorrect info on any field.
__hints.common.deadlineBanner.defaultLabel: Default label on the statutory-deadline countdown banner (design-system.md §7.6); a specific page may override with its own label key, e.g. voter-registration roll closure.
__hints.common.deadlineBanner.daysLeft: The countdown figure suffix, e.g. '12 days left' — {days} is a plain integer, not localized-plural-aware yet (MVP).
__hints.common.badge.flagPending: Status chip on a citizen's own flagged-correction list (/account/submissions) while a curator has not yet acted on it.
__hints.common.badge.flagAccepted: Status chip when a curator accepted and published the citizen's flagged correction.
__hints.common.badge.flagRejected: Status chip when a curator reviewed and rejected the citizen's flagged correction.
__hints.common.badge.wardReady: Curator/admin chip: this ward's report cards meet the publish-readiness bar.
__hints.common.badge.wardHeld: Curator/admin chip: this ward is missing required data and is held back from readiness — a work state, not an error (design-system.md §7.13).
__hints.home.meta.title: Browser tab title / <title> for the Home page ('/', '/kn/').
__hints.home.hero.heading: Home page H1 above the ward search form.
__hints.home.form.label: Label on the Home ward-search input, which accepts either a free-text address or a 6-digit pincode.
__hints.home.form.helper: Helper text under the address input clarifying the pincode fallback path (PRD §5.1).
__hints.home.result.shortlistHeading: Shown above the list of ward links when a pincode maps to more than one ward.
__hints.home.result.outOfCoverage: Shown when an address or pincode resolves outside the GBA area — an explicit answer, not an error (PRD §5.1).
__hints.home.result.usePincode: Shown when address geocoding was ambiguous, budget-exhausted, or failed and the citizen is nudged to the pincode fallback instead.
__hints.home.election.awaited: Home page election-status banner before the notification date is set in app_settings — one Home page, no separate pre-notification variant (IA §3.1).
__hints.home.election.status: Home page election-status line once both notification_date and election_date are set in app_settings; {notificationDate} and {electionDate} are the raw stored date strings.
__hints.home.shortcuts.checkRegistration.descrip: Subtext under the Home page shortcut card linking to /check-registration.
